title: Finn's Dragonite
description: this mod adds a new op teir of gear but it dosent come easy
body:
this mod adds a new teir of gear to the game called dragonite 

but first you need to get a dragon star this will prove a difficalt task as it requires lots of dragon scales, dust and neatherite after all the that you need a neather star
this makes your end game alot more fun as you will whant to upgrade you neatherite one at a time, youll have to prioritise what you think is important
adds
\-dragonite tools and armor
\-dragon scales
\-dragonite dust
\-dragonite ingot
\-dragon stars
\-new star zombie (dropes the dragonite dust)

  in 1.2.0 and 2.0.0
added
limestone
changed
mob from ancient dimension (star zombie)
